creator: cullum@sacredheartsc.com
text:
Created attachment 255039
Workaround for EINVAL from VIDIOC_EXPBUF ioctl

The original patch for this issue (PR 236673) seems to have been lost. FreeBSD 14.1 is still returning EINVAL for the VIDIOC_EXPBUF ioctl, which breaks gstreamer-based V4L applications.

The attach patch applies cleanly to multimedia/gstreamer1-plugins-good version 1.24.9, and allows my Logitech webcam to work again with gstreamer-based applications (specifically the Dino XMPP client).
